title: Lucid Group Q1 2024 Earnings Call Summary
text: Lucid Group missed earnings expectations with an EPS of -$0.29579 versus expected -$0.25. Q1 2024 production was 1,728 Lucid Air vehicles. Deliveries were 1,967 vehicles, representing 39.9% year-over-year growth and marked the best quarter-to-date for deliveries. Full year 2024 guidance was approximately 9,000 vehicles expected. The company raised $1 billion in capital through a private placement of convertible preferred stock from the Public Investment Fund (PIF). CEO Peter Rawlinson emphasized the partnership with PIF as a key differentiator and stated he was more optimistic than ever about the company's future. Rawlinson highlighted the company's competitive advantages including superior in-house technology.
